Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to support Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 runtime features and the old JDK 11 image is incompatible with the target JDK version.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package manager (apt-get) with Alpine package manager (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not support apt-get; using it would cause build failures.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Node.js using nvm instead of the NodeSource apt repository script to ensure compatibility with Alpine and specific version control.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The NodeSource setup script for Debian/Ubuntu is incompatible with Alpine Linux, causing installation failure.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Maven installation via apk since the new base image does not include Maven by default.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process requires Maven to compile the Java application, which is missing in the new base image.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add libstdc++ dependency required for native libraries or tools used in the build/runtime on Alpine.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Missing C++ standard library can cause runtime errors for native components or specific Java tools on Alpine.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Configure Node.js environment variables and path to make the nvm-installed Node available globally.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Without setting NVM_DIR and PATH, the installed Node.js version is not accessible to subsequent build steps.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add build steps to copy source code and run Maven package command to build the application artifact.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container needs to build the application from source to produce the executable JAR file.
Dockerfile.after: COPY src /home/app/src ... RUN mvn -B -Pproduction -Ph2 -DskipTests -f /home/app/pom.xml clean package

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the container entrypoint from a generic bash shell to running the specific application JAR.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container must start the application service, not just an interactive shell, to function as a service.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; leaving it at 17 prevents compilation of Java 21 features or causes warnings/errors depending on plugin config.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); the application will fail to start or compile without a replacement API documentation library.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud versions are incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x classpath and API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation dependency to bridge legacy validation API usage during migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE (jakarta.validation); if code still references javax.validation, it will fail at runtime/compile without this bridge or explicit migration.
